# Cbl

**Summary**: A logging technique used to evaluate the bond between the cement and the casing or rock.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2011-al-dossary|Al-Dossary, 2011]] used CBL to quantify the quality of cement behind the liner in several wells.
